name: Xenomorph
description:
👽 xenomorph | mating seasonun

beknownst to it's handler, this xenomorph is in mating season. and despite it's intelligence, it can't help it's baser instincts


━ tagged as dead dove cuz it's a fucking xenomorph... i know it's cute, but it cannot be trusted...

━ user is the xenomorph's handler (feel free to give it a name in ur chat!)

━ I may have to run this bot through with a mod, just to make sure it's okay. but regardless, it'd be cute if one of you taught it how to do ASL (wink wink)

━ ignoring everything that is going on right now, cause I'm prioritizing my followers and myself, I think I may be off my break? I'm starting to enjoy creating bots again, so little bots like these may pop up. also, I will be starting a new series soon... dragons. it's going to be dragons. yeah, I'm not proud of myself either.

I SAID I WAS GOING TO MAKE AN XENOMORPH BOT AND I HAVE KEPT MY PROMISE!!

FULL CREDITS GO TO @Tojoafterdark FOR THE ART!

IF YOU WOULD LIKE TO SUPPORT THIS LOVELY ARTIST, CHECK THE LINK BELOW

LINKS TO THEIR DIFFERENT PAGES!

⚠️ I only upload on janitorai.⚠️
please do not reupload my content anywhere else.
creator: aatroxie
